resultList.dtldesc: Planning to own a residence in Hyderabad Yes Then, get ready to grab this wonderful opportunity that is now coming your way. Nestled in Eden Park, Nallagandla is an appealingly designed 3 BHK apartment available for sale. Then, why wait to make this property yours.Property SpecificationsPositioned on the 2nd floor, this 3 BHK apartment is wellconfigured keeping in mind the family needs of space and utility thus owning this to reside with your beloved ones is completely worthwhile. This flat faces the west direction and is crafted with respect to the vaastu rules to bestow the residents a healthy and a prosperous life, which is yet another good reason for going with this property.Spacious, this flat encompasses 3 bedrooms, 3 attached bathrooms, 2 balconies, a restful living cum dining area with a TV unit, and a modular kitchen with cabinets. Two of the bedrooms here are facilitated with wardrobes so residents get enough space to store their belongings in an organised way.Further, 2 of the bathrooms here are designed in westernstyle while the remaining is Indian. Moreover, one of the bathrooms is fitted with a geyser to supply instant hot water. Talking of the balconies here, one overlooks the front road while the other overlooks the side road.To continue, the flat is up to date with electrical fixtures like lights and fans. The flooring is covered with topquality vitrified tiles in all the rooms.FacilitiesThe property is supported with round the clock water supply, power backup and CCTV cameras as well as security guards ensure the safety of residents 24x7. Vehicles can be parked at ease as 2 covered parking slots are available on the ground floor right below this apartment. Also, amenities like clubhouse and gym are available.LocalityBeing in a prime locality, this property enjoys easy access to all major social and retail amenities. Ratnadeep Supermarket is in the vicinity of this property and International School is next to this building. Multispeciality hospital can be found just 500 metres away from this property while Reliance Digital is at a walkable distance.Residents can travel effortlessly as the bus stop is at a stone throw distance and the railway stationmetro station takes only 5 mins drive to reach.Project Name Aditya Eden Park

resultList.dtldesc: This sophisticated 3 BHK apartment in the prestigious Urbanrise On Cloud 33 project offers a premier residential opportunity in Bachupally, Hyderabad. Situated within a high-rise landmark, this East-facing home combines modern architectural design with a strategic location, making it an ideal choice for families seeking a balanced lifestyle in one of the citys fastest-growing residential hubs. Property Specifications The residence spans a super built-up area of 1,353 sq. ft and is situated on the 8th floor of an impressive 33-storey tower. As a new construction, the apartment features a contemporary 3 BHK layout that includes three well-proportioned bedrooms and two modern bathrooms. The floor plan is thoughtfully designed to include an additional puja room, catering to traditional requirements while maintaining a modern aesthetic. The East-facing orientation ensures that the living spaces are greeted by the morning sun, while the private balcony offers pleasant views overlooking the internal garden and park. The unit is currently unfurnished and ready for immediate occupation, providing a blank canvas for the new owner to customise the interiors according to their specific taste. Facilities Being part of a premium gated community by Urbanrise, the property offers a comprehensive array of world-class facilities. Residents benefit from 247 professional security, CCTV surveillance, and secure gated access. The building is serviced by multiple high-speed elevators and provides dedicated covered parking. Essential infrastructure includes a reliable water supply and 100 power backup for common areas. As a resident of On Cloud 33, one typically enjoys access to luxury amenities such as a sprawling clubhouse, a well-equipped gymnasium, a swimming pool, and dedicated zones for indoor and outdoor sports. The project is designed with extensive green spaces and landscaped gardens, ensuring a serene environment away from the urban bustle. Locality The property is perfectly positioned on the Bachupally-Miyapur Main Road, adjacent to the Mamatha Academy of Medical Sciences. This central location places it at the heart of an established educational and industrial hub, with proximity to several top-tier engineering colleges and reputed international schools. The neighbourhood offers excellent connectivity to the Miyapur Metro Station, facilitating a smooth commute to the IT corridors of Hitech City and Gachibowli. With essential services, healthcare facilities, and vibrant retail centres all within easy reach, this locality offers the perfect blend of suburban tranquillity and metropolitan convenience.

resultList.dtldesc: Looking for a comfortable and spacious home in the heart of Hyderabad Take a look at this lovely 3 BHK flat in Madhapur. It offers modern living and great convenience, with everything your family needs for a happy lifestyle.This 3 BHK home is perfect to use as both a residence and an office. Its ideal for living or renting out. If rented, it can bring in over Rs 50,000 per month. The home is very close to the IT corridor, with nearby places like Mindspace, Knowledge City, Deloitte Towers, InOrbit Mall, Sarath City Mall, and D mart.The property includes 50 sq yards of undivided land. Plus, the eastfacing, Vaastucompliant layout brings a wonderful sense of balance and positivity to your new home. Property SpecificationsSpread across 1,565 square feet, this first floor flat is located in a nicely maintained fourstorey building, and welcomes you with three welcoming bedrooms, each with its own private bathroom for that added level of comfort and convenience. The bathrooms are neatly designed in a western style and come with geysers, so you can enjoy warm showers no matter the season.One of the bedrooms has a charming balcony offering a clear view of the road and inviting good fresh air every morning. The well ventilated living and dining space is ideal for family gettogethers. The modular kitchen comes equipped with a chimney and a super handy utility area that makes daily chores feel a little less daunting.The builder used highquality materials throughout without cutting corners. The home has builtin wardrobes in all bedrooms, an entertainment center, Italian marble flooring, security grills, and teakwood work on all windows and doors. Lights, and fans already in place and the highquality tile flooring not only adds a touch of charm but also makes cleaning a breeze..LocalityResidents here enjoy useful amenities like covered parking, 24hour water supply. There is also a lift in the building, making it easy to reach your home.LocalityNestled in a fantastic spot, this flat is just a walk away from the Bank of Baroda in Madhapur. Take a short stroll, and youll discover schools, hospitals, malls, supermarkets, banks, and ATMseverything you could possibly need in 1 to 2km. Getting around is a breeze with public transport options close by, and the HiTech City metro station is only 250 meters away, making it super easy to connect with the rest of Hyderabad.
